claims.summary: An additive 12D glimpse of length 11 or 13 must not become validated state or panic.
claims.disposition: implement exact 11- and 13-element regressions while preserving raw malformed payload evidence

claims.summary: Typed/legacy fingerprint coherence should return 1.0 for identical slots and 0.0 for the divergent fixture.
claims.disposition: verify aligned, divergent, zero-reference, width, and finite-value coherence coverage

claims.summary: Mathematical fingerprint coherence cannot substitute for felt integration.
claims.disposition: verify typed integrity and felt-contract review remain separate records

claims.summary: Shadow V2 and V3 compatibility must remain explicit rather than silently reinterpret one as the other.
claims.disposition: verify separate optional schema fields and typed-fingerprint precedence
